Agentic AI: The Digital Workforce
Autonomous Execution Layer
Beyond Tracking:
Meet Your Digital Workforce

Traditional software waits for you to tell it what happened. Intellibyld’s Agentic AI acts on its own to make sure your project stays on track. By unifying your BIM models, ERP data, and supplier communications into a single Autonomous Execution Layer, we’ve moved beyond simple dashboards to a system that proactively manages the heavy lifting of construction logistics.

  • Autonomous Logistics: Freeing teams for site execution.
  • Proactive Neutralization: Stopping threats early.
  • Zero Friction: Fast-tracking RFQs and shipments.
Learn more
Autonomous Execution
Why Choose Intellibyld
Agentic AI

Autonomous RFQ Generation

Our AI agents autonomously generate and dispatch RFQs to pre-qualified vendors, eliminating manual procurement bottlenecks.

01

Intelligent Bid Evaluation

Agentic workflows compare vendor bids against project specs, historical pricing, and delivery reliability in real time.

02

Shipment Orchestration

AI agents monitor shipments end-to-end, automatically rerouting or escalating when delays or exceptions arise.

03

Predictive Scheduling

Agents anticipate material needs weeks ahead by analysing project timelines, weather, and supplier lead times.

04

Exception Handling

When something goes wrong, agentic AI triages the issue, proposes alternatives, and executes the approved fix autonomously.

05

Continuous Learning

Every decision feeds back into the model, so the system gets smarter with each project your team delivers.

06
How It Works
Autonomous Delay Neutralization
01

Detect & Flag

Agents monitor live shipping, Email and WhatsApp logs to identify supplier delays before they reach the site.

02

Analyze Impact

AI cross-references the Digital Twin to pinpoint every labor crew and task affected by the missing material.

03

Pivot & Re-align

The system autonomously re-sequences the schedule, shifting crews to unaffected tasks to maintain momentum.

04

Sync & Track

Automatically notifies stakeholders of changes while continuously tracking the delay until the site is back in sync.
